headline: Lockheed Martin Stock Rises 10.8% in 6 Months: More Upside Ahead?
summary: LMT gains from a $186.4B backlog, F-35 demand and global defense deals, but program delays and high debt may keep new investors cautious.

raw.headline: Lockheed Martin Stock Rises 10.8% in 6 Months: More Upside Ahead?
raw.summary: LMT gains from a $186.4B backlog, F-35 demand and global defense deals, but program delays and high debt may keep new investors cautious.

headline: Jet Aviation Delivers First Pilatus PC-24 to French Navy
summary: LANDIVISIAU, France - Jet Aviation announced today the delivery of the first of three PC-24 aircraft it has purchased for the French Navy. The company will also provide ongoing sustainment support for...

headline: General Dynamics: The Submarine Anchor And The Gulfstream Engine
summary: General Dynamics' marine segment offers long-term, low-risk cash flow but faces margin pressures. Read why I rate GD stock a Hold at this point.
